title: pilosella × obornyana subsp. subtatrensis
intro: Pilosella × obornyana subsp. subtatrensis, also known as a rare hybrid plant, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to inhibit the growth of cancer cells and to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Pilosella × obornyana subsp. subtatrensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit immunomodulatory effects. However, no information is available on herbal preparations made from this plant, and further research is necessary to confirm its medicinal value.
